query:
UPDATE ai_knowledge_base_documents 
                SET processing_metadata = jsonb_set(
                    jsonb_set(
                        COALESCE(processing_metadata, '{}'),
                        '{status}',
                        '"failed"'
                    ),
                    '{error}',
                    '"No chunks were created"'::jsonb
                ),
                updated_at = $1
                WHERE id = $2
